__description: Chat conversation summaries for SQL chat_summaries table (ChatSummary ORM). Created/updated automatically when message count hits multiples of 10. Seeded to provide pre-existing summaries for demo customers. customer_id must match chat_messages.json and customer_profiles.json.

chat_summaries.summary_text: <string: condensed summary of the conversation so far — key topics, requests, issues>
chat_summaries.summarized_up_to_id: <int: ChatMessage.id of last message included in this summary>
chat_summaries.total_messages_at_update: <int: total message count when summary was last updated>
